name: Ahmed Ali Laghari
summary: First-year BSCS student at NUST (H-12, Batch 2029) with a strong self-directed track record in machine learning and data analysis.

projects.name: Neural Network from Scratch
projects.description: Designed a feedforward neural network entirely from scratch implementing forward pass, backpropagation, and gradient descent manually without any ML framework.

projects.name: Fake News Detector
projects.description: Developed a text classification pipeline using TF-IDF vectorisation with Logistic Regression and Naive Bayes.

projects.name: Gold Price Prediction
projects.description: Predicted gold prices from financial indicators using a RandomForest Regressor with correlation-based feature selection.

projects.name: Customer Segmentation
projects.description: Segmented customers by spending behaviour using K-Means clustering with the Elbow Method.
